title: How can I a recurring excel import automation?
excerpt:
Hello, 
I have a excel file which I imported to my board. 
The column matching was done manually. 
Now my data in the excel file changed. 
I want to import the excel file again into my board but I don’t wont to match all…

posts.author: Schwenk (Leonard Schwenk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I have a excel file which I imported to my board.
The column matching was done manually.
Now my data in the excel file changed.
I want to import the excel file again into my board but I don’t wont to match alle the column again ?
So how can I create a recurring excel import automation or how can I save the column matchings ?
I also thought about import the excel in one board with matching column names and then mirror the column into a new board and renaming the column.
Which does not work as the “mirror board” needs entries.
Thanks for you help.
Greets,
Schwenk

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Schwenk
Welcome to the community

If you a few changes to some column data, you can use the Toolkit to update your monday.com board without uploading the whole file again.

Here is a demo on how.

If you need any help with the app, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com
